ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 60-79) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* The starting age of the age group */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* The ending age of the age group */,
  "age_group_category" TEXT /* The category of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_name" TEXT /* Name of the week (e.g., 2020-12) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* The week number of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the week */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week */,
  "difference" INTEGER /* Difference in the value compared to the previous week */,
  "trend" REAL /* Trend in the value (percentage change) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric (e.g., number of cases) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the epidemiological data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* The method used to collect the data */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* The confidence interval of the data */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* The margin of error of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure (e.g., Lockdown, Mask Mandate) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the measure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* The type of public health measure */,
  "measure_target" TEXT /* The target population of the public health measure */,
  "measure_enforcement_level" TEXT /* The level of enforcement of the public health measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measure_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact entry */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public health measure */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the measure on the age group */,
  "impact_assessment_method" TEXT /* The method used to assess the impact of the public health measure */,
  "impact_confidence_interval" REAL /* The confidence interval of the impact assessment */,
  "impact_margin_of_error" REAL /* The margin of error of the impact assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measure_impact_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measure_impact_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES public_health_measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the age group */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution in the age group */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution in the age group */,
  "population_density" REAL /* The population density of the age group */,
  "urbanization_level" TEXT /* The level of urbanization of the age group */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* The education level of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric (e.g., Number of Cases, Hospitalization Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement of the health metric */,
  "metric_description_long" TEXT /* A longer description of the health metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "value_uncertainty" REAL /* The uncertainty associated with the metric value */,
  "value_data_source" TEXT /* The source of the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* The department of the user */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* The job title of the user */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* The permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used to access the data */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* The location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* The format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* The status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used to access the report */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* The location from which the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
